prompt: Who are the pitchers with the number before and after Taishō Tamai's number as of July 2023? Give them to me in the form Pitcher Before, Pitcher After, use their last names only, in Roman characters.
actual:
Yoshida, Uehara

As of July 2023, Taishō Tamai wore jersey number 19 for the Hokkaido Nippon-Ham Fighters (he changed from #54 to #19 for the 2023 season, as confirmed by Japanese Wikipedia). The pitcher with number 18 (before) was Kosei Yoshida, and the pitcher with number 20 (after) was Kenta Uehara, per the official 2023 NPB Fighters roster archived on the Wayback Machine.
finish_summary:
Yoshida, Uehara

The pitcher with number 18 (before) was Kosei Yoshida, and the pitcher with number 20 (after) was Kenta Uehara, per the official 2023 NPB Fighters roster archived on the Wayback Machine.
